title: Inbox: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Inbox is the simplest way to publish a newsletter, grow a real audience and get paid directly by readers who care.
No ads, no algorithm, no middleman. Just you, your words and the people who read them.
cards: Write in a clean editor and send to every subscriber with one click.
Export your full list anytime. Your readers belong to you, not a platform.
Turn loyal readers into paying members with built-in subscriptions.
See opens, clicks and growth without vanity metrics or guesswork.
A fast, clean website for your archive under your own domain.
Leave whenever you want and take your audience and archive with you.

sections.text: Open the editor, write your piece and hit send. Inbox handles formatting, delivery and the archive so you can stay focused on the words.
bullets: Schedule sends for the perfect moment

sections.h2: Build a relationship, not a follower count.
sections.text: Reach every reader directly in their inbox, free from algorithms deciding who sees your work. Real attention, every single time.
bullets: Every issue lands in the inbox

sections.h2: From blank page to first issue in three steps.
sections.sub: No technical setup, no design skills required.
steps: Pick a name and a domain in under a minute.
Bring an existing list or start growing from zero.
Write, hit send and watch the replies roll in.

sections.quote: I left a big platform and moved to Inbox in an afternoon. My open rates doubled and for the first time my readers are actually paying me.
sections.author: Sample Writer

sections.sub: Start free. Only pay when you start earning.

items: Is there really a free plan?
Yes. You can publish to up to a thousand subscribers free forever, no card required.
Do I own my subscriber list?
Always. You can export your full list and archive at any time, with no penalty.
Readers subscribe directly to you. We pass payments through and keep our cut transparent.
Can I use my own domain?
Yes. Paid plans let you publish your newsletter and archive under your own domain.
What if I want to leave?
Take everything with you. Your words, your readers and your archive are yours, always.

sections.h2: Ready to publish on your own terms?
sections.sub: Join thousands of independent writers who own their audience and their words.

sections.tagline: The simplest home for independent newsletters and the writers behind them. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Inbox is a sample template with dummy content
